
### ex.: dependencies and hazards (1) 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/pipeline/texfig/hazardVDepEx.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/hazardVDepEx.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/pipeline/texfig/hazardVDepEx.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/pipeline/texfig/hazardVDepEx.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}


:::
